name: Dingxi Elementary internal brand source
source_root_unc: \\10.235.72.5\0-1學校共用資料--行政資料區\00學校徽圖、校歌、校旗、獎狀
usage: Use this source only when running inside Dingxi Elementary School's internal network.

public_repo_policy.fallback: Use placeholder assets if the internal network path is unavailable.

instructions_for_ai_assistant: If the UNC path is reachable, inspect the folder and use the authorized Dingxi school crest or approved brand assets.
Copy selected assets into local_target using the expected output filenames.
If the UNC path is not reachable, keep placeholder assets and do not generate, imitate, redraw, or trace the official school crest.
Do not commit copied official brand image files to a public repository unless the user explicitly confirms that the target is school-internal only.
